Enumeration Case# kIOHIDQueueOptionsTypeEnqueueAll

macOS 10.12+

```
kIOHIDQueueOptionsTypeEnqueueAll = 0x01
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/kernel/1644504-anonymous/kiohidqueueoptionstypeenqueueall#discussion)

Force the IOHIDQueue to enqueue all events, relative or absolute, regardless of change.
